basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Anna University, College of Engineering Guindy (CEG), Chennai
basic_details.short_information: Anna University CEG is recruiting for 1 Project Assistant position on a temporary basis.

qualification.details: criteria: Details | general information: Selected candidate may register for M.S./Ph.D. programme. Must be willing to join immediately.
qualification.education_qualification: B.E./B.Tech in Mechanical / Manufacturing / Production / Materials and Metallurgical Engineering (OR) M.E./M.Tech/MS in Manufacturing / Production / Materials and Metallurgical Engineering and related disciplines.

how_to_apply: Interested candidates should send the filled-in application form (as per format) with self-attested photocopies of educational qualifications, date of birth certificate, experience certificates (if any), and mark sheets by post to:
Dr. I. Suresh Kannan Assistant Professor Dept. of Mechanical Engineering College of Engineering Guindy (CEG) Anna University, Chennai – 600 025
Mention on the envelope: “Application for Project Assistant CMRG Project No. CMRG250837”.
Scanned PDF copy of the application should also be sent by email. Do not enclose original certificates.
important_instructions: The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Shortlisted candidates will be called for written test / interview. No TA/DA will be provided. The selection process is strictly as per CMRG and University guidelines.

content_sections.heading: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Anna University has invited applications for the position of Project Assistant in the project “Development of Solid lubricant coated natural rock inserts for Eco-Friendly machining of Automotive Components” funded by CMRG, Government of Tamil Nadu. Download Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Anna University CEG is recruiting for 1 Project Assistant position on a temporary basis.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested candidates should send the filled-in application form (as per format) with self-attested photocopies of educational qualifications, date of birth certificate, experience certificates (if any), and mark sheets by post to: Dr. I. Suresh Kannan Assistant Professor Dept. of Mechanical Engineering College of Engineering Guindy (CEG) Anna University, Chennai – 600 025 Email: [email protected] Mention on the envelope: “Application for Project Assistant CMRG Project No. CMRG250837”. Scanned PDF copy of the application should also be sent by email. Do not enclose original certificates.

content_sections.heading: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: The position is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Shortlisted candidates will be called for written test / interview. No TA/DA will be provided. The selection process is strictly as per CMRG and University guidelines.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Anna University Project Assistant CMRG250837?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 15th July 2026 (05:30 PM).

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary for Project Assistant at Anna University CEG?
faq.answer: Consolidated emoluments are Rs. 25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What is the eligibility for Anna University Project Assistant in Mechanical Engineering?
faq.answer: B.E./B.Tech or M.E./M.Tech in Mechanical / Manufacturing / Production / Materials Engineering or related disciplines.

faq.question: Q4. What is the duration of the Project Assistant position under CMRG250837?
faq.answer: The project duration is 3 Years.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Send the filled application form with self-attested documents by post and scanned copy by email to [email protected].

faq.question: Q6. Can selected candidates register for PhD at Anna University?
faq.answer: Yes, selected candidates may be permitted to register for M.S. / Ph.D. programme.

faq.question: Q7. Is prior experience mandatory for Anna University Project Assistant?
faq.answer: It is desirable. Candidates with relevant research or project experience will have an advantage.

faq.question: Q8. Will there be an interview for Anna University CMRG Project Assistant?
faq.answer: Yes, shortlisted candidates will be called for written test and/or interview.

faq.question: Q9. Is the Anna University Project Assistant position permanent?
faq.answer: No, it is purely temporary and co-terminus with the project.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Refer to the advertisement released by the Department of Mechanical Engineering, CEG, Anna University.
